calendar.matters:
Compromise Of Person With A Disabilit.
Off Calendar Dec-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha & Carla Amador, CSR: Lavena Ward #7077 (Department 218)

Appearances
Petitioner, Marie Hutchinson, individually as wrongful death heir and as successor in-interest to went, is not present.
Claimant, Steven C. Hutchinson, is not present.
Attorney, Maurren C. McGowan, appearing on behalf of the petitioner and claimant.

This matter comes on calendar this day for a Compromise of an Adult Person with Disability. On December 3, 2007, the Court granted an order waiving the appearance of petitioner and claimant.

The Court after hearing counsel's oral offer of proof and on the basis of written evidence received, the Court GRANTS the Petition and compromise is approved. The total gross amount of the settlement in favor of the claimant is $42,500.00. From the total gross amount, payment of fees is to be disbursed as follows: attorneys fees in the sum of $17,000.00 payable to Brayton Purcell LLP, reimbursement for medical and all other expenses expenses paid by the petitioner or attorney in the sum of $2,182.84. The balance of the judgment available for the claimant after payment of all allowed fess and expenses is $23,317.16. Said amount shall be distributed to Marie Hutchinson, Guardian of the estate of Steven C. Hutchinson, in the probate Court of the State of Ohio. Future settlements may be accepted by petitioner, acting on behalf of the claimant, and 10% to be allocated to the claimant.

Order Approving Compromise of Pending action signed by Commissioner Sue Kaplan in open court.
